SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-22-2015 Continued To May-07-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Wednesday 22,2015 in Department 525:
Ovays Patel, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as propria.
Randy Houseman, Appellant/Defendant appears in Propria Persona.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn. Randy Houseman request a continuance due to his attorney being sick and unable to appear.
The parties present arguments to the Court. Arguments having been submitted, the Court continues the matter to May 7th,2015. Court stands adjourned.

Judge Pro Tem Richard Grotch; Clerk Jean Kong; matter not reported.
